items.name: Irregular Choice Black Dinosaur Hoodie
items.description: Turn everyday style into wearable art with this bold Irregular Choice Black Dinosaur Hoodie, available exclusively at the Hex Mall. Bursting with colour and creativity, this standout piece features an abstract, painterly print layered with playful patterns and unexpected details—true to Irregular Choice’s fearless fashion spirit.

items.name: Irregular Choice Blue Dinosaur Hoodie
items.description: Step into standout style with this eye-catching Irregular Choice Blue Dinosaur Hoodie, now reimagined in cool blue tones and available at the Hex Mall. Featuring a striking mix of abstract artwork, layered textures, and playful patterns, this jumper captures the brand’s signature love for the unexpected.

items.name: Japan Purple Belt | Anime Accessory | Samurai Obi
items.description:
Feel the whisper of ancient blades and the glow of midnight cherry blossoms with this vibrant violet samurai obi — handwoven in the shadows of Kyoto’s forgotten temples.

Deep purple like twilight over Mount Fuji, threaded with mystic energy — perfect for your anime warrior, cyber-ninja, or kawaii Ronin.
